Welcome to Avyré

Cambodia's premium fashion boutique since 2015. We bring iconic international brands and our own exclusive collections to the heart of Phnom Penh — and now to your doorstep. From smart casual to weekend streetwear, discover fashion that tells your story.

Our Story

From a small boutique in Phnom Penh to Cambodia's leading fashion destination — this is Avyré.

Born in Cambodia,
Inspired by the World

Avyré was founded in 2015 with a simple but ambitious goal: to bring premium international fashion to Cambodia at accessible prices. What started as a single boutique in Phnom Penh has grown into one of the country's most loved fashion destinations.

Today we operate over 5 stores nationwide and serve thousands of customers online. Our curated mix of in-house Avyré collections and internationally recognised brands — Nike, Adidas, Pomelo and more — means there's something for every style and occasion.

We believe fashion should be inclusive, joyful, and empowering. Every piece we carry is chosen with care, quality, and our customers' lives in mind.

Our Mission

To make premium fashion accessible to every Cambodian — in every city, for every occasion, at every stage of life.

🎯
Quality First
Every product we stock passes rigorous quality checks. We partner only with brands that share our commitment to craftsmanship and durability.
🌏
Accessible Fashion
We believe great style shouldn't cost a fortune. Our collections span every price point so that everyone can dress with confidence.
💚
Responsible Retail
We're committed to sustainable practices — from eco-friendly packaging to supporting local Cambodian designers and artisans.
5+
Stores Nationwide
7+
Years in Business
10K+
Happy Customers

Brands We Carry

Meet the Team

The passionate people behind Avyré — dedicated to bringing you the best of fashion every day.

Chenda Vong
Founder & CEO
Chenda built Avyré from a single store in 2015 into Cambodia's leading fashion brand. Her vision drives everything we do.
Dara Pich
Head of Design
With 12 years in the industry, Dara leads our in-house design team and shapes the aesthetic direction of every Avyré collection.
Sopheap Keo
Head of Operations
Sopheap ensures that every order arrives on time and every store runs smoothly across all 38 locations nationwide.
Maly Chan
Customer Experience
Maly leads our support team, making sure every customer interaction reflects the warmth and care that Avyré stands for.

What We Stand For

✨
Premium Quality
Every garment and accessory we sell is held to the highest standards of material quality and construction.
🤝
Community First
We invest in the communities where we operate — supporting local talent, events, and Cambodian fashion culture.
🌱
Sustainability
From recycled packaging to responsible sourcing, we are actively reducing our environmental footprint.
💡
Innovation
We constantly evolve — from in-store experiences to our digital platform — to serve our customers better.

Ready to Shop?

Browse our full collection or visit one of our 5 stores across Cambodia.

Get in Touch

We'd love to hear from you. Whether it's a question about an order, a product query, or just a hello — our team is here.
